indicators.name: Well-lit workspace
indicators.rationale: The room is well-lit, which is conducive to computer work.

indicators.name: Comfortable seating
indicators.rationale: The chair is comfortable and positioned near the desk, supporting prolonged computer use.

indicators.name: Ample storage
indicators.rationale: The built-in shelves provide ample storage for books and other items, keeping the workspace organized.

indicators.name: Private setting
indicators.rationale: The room appears to be isolated from other areas, providing a private setting for focused work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is well-suited for computer work (Solo) due to its well-lit workspace, comfortable seating, ample storage, and private setting.
